items.Title: % Anisotropic Filtered
items.Description: Percent of texels filtered using the 'Anisotropic' sampling method.

items.Title: % Texture Fetch Stall
items.Description: Percentage of clock cycles of a drawcall where the shader processors cannot make any more requests for texture data. A high value for this metric implies the shaders cannot get texture data from the texture pipe (L1, L2 cache or memory) fast enough, and rendering performance may be negatively affected.

items.Title: Textures / Fragment
items.Description: Average number of textures referenced per fragment.

items.Title: Fragment Instructions / Fragments Shaded
items.Description: Fragment Instructions / Second divided by Fragments Shaded / Second

items.Title: Vertex Instructions / Vertex Shaded
items.Description: Vertex Instructions / Second divided by Vertex Shaded / Second

items.Title: % Vertex Fetch Stall
items.Description: Percentage of clock cycles of a drawcall where the GPU cannot make any more requests for vertex data. A high value for this metric implies the GPU cannot get vertex data from memory fast enough, and rendering performance may be negatively affected.

items.Title: Avg Bytes / Vertex
items.Description: Average number of bytes transferred from main memory for each vertex.

items.Title: MSAA
items.Description: MSAA Level, affects bin number doubling every level
